title: Plush Banquet Venue, Ranthambore
excerpt: A hospitality venue shaped around dramatic procession, climate-responsive courts, and premium guest flow.
description: The spatial sequence begins with a low, immersive entry and opens into a layered banquet court that balances scale with intimacy.
Material restraint and generous openings allow the architecture to stay timeless while supporting operational flexibility.
Service circulation, event logistics, and back-of-house planning were integrated from the first concept stage.

title: Auric Residence, Jaipur
excerpt: A luxury residence interior focused on proportion, natural textures, and clear functional zoning.
description: The interior planning uses long visual axes and soft transitions to create a composed living experience.
Joinery, lighting, and material detailing are coordinated for consistency from concept through execution.

title: Horizon Corporate Campus, Gurgaon
excerpt: A performance-focused office campus with premium facade rhythm and delivery-ready documentation.
description: The design strategy organizes departments along an atrium spine to improve collaboration and daylight penetration.
Envelope and core systems were tuned for high occupancy performance and long-term adaptability.

title: Dune Villa Landscape, Surat
excerpt: A low-maintenance landscape composition with cooling shade strategy and curated experience zones.
description: Planting structure and hardscape geometry were developed together to reduce heat gain and improve year-round comfort.
The outdoor program includes social courts, reflective pockets, and private retreat zones.

title: Atlas Documentation Suite, Udaipur
excerpt: A complete construction documentation package designed to reduce site ambiguity and decision delays.
description: The documentation framework includes coordinated plans, details, schedules, and issue-resolution protocols.
This approach shortened site clarification loops and increased execution predictability.

title: Metro Headquarters Fit-Out, Mumbai
excerpt: A high-performance office fit-out balancing executive identity, collaboration zones, and delivery speed.
description: Workplace planning prioritized team adjacency, acoustic separation, and client-facing brand moments.
Material and MEP integration were managed in parallel to protect delivery timelines.
